critical.title: Docker-VM unreachable
critical.evidence: Ping: 100% packet loss; SSH: Operation timed out after ConnectTimeout=15.
critical.impact: Docker-VM services and guest state cannot be audited; Portainer/Dockge/9router availability unknown.

critical.title: OMV /dev/sdg SMART media defects
critical.evidence: SMART PASSED but Reallocated_Sector_Ct=32, Current_Pending_Sector=8, Offline_Uncorrectable=8; 35,132 power-on hours; 39 C.
critical.impact: Pending and offline-uncorrectable sectors indicate active disk risk to ark/NAS data.

critical.title: Immich backup gap
critical.evidence: Latest archive Jul 7 02:08, 6.5G. Jul 12 run failed after 16.28G staging with tar|zstd interrupted by signal; prior Jul 11 also failed.
critical.impact: No successful Immich rootfs backup for ~5 days; recovery point gap for production photos service metadata/config.

critical.title: Current LXCs 108 and 109 have no backup archive
critical.evidence: No vzdump-lxc-108 or vzdump-lxc-109 archive found in backup-nas/dump.
critical.impact: Sandbox and Guacamole are outside current backup coverage.

warnings.title: Pi-hole Unbound failed
warnings.evidence: unbound.service failed; pihole-FTL and dnscrypt-proxy active; DNS ports 53 and admin HTTP 80 listening.
warnings.impact: DNSCrypt path is operational, but Unbound DNS-over-TLS path is unavailable.

warnings.title: Immich stale failed mount unit
warnings.evidence: run-rpc_pipefs.mount failed; Immich API 2283 and web 3003 open; /api/server/ping returned HTTP 200 pong.
warnings.impact: Likely stale/non-service mount failure; service functional but unit state should be cleaned after diagnosis.

warnings.title: NextcloudPi failed units
warnings.evidence: nvmf-autoconnect.service and openipmi.service failed; Apache 80/443 listening; occ status: installed, version 33.0.2.2, maintenance=false, needsDbUpgrade=false.
warnings.impact: Optional hardware/NVMe units failed; Nextcloud web service remains listening and app reports healthy.

warnings.title: Tailscale LXC systemd cascade
warnings.evidence: 28 failed units including journald/network/tmp/cockpit-related units; tailscaled UDP listener and SSH remain present.
warnings.impact: Container has degraded systemd state; Tailscale service may still run but management/boot reliability is reduced.

warnings.title: OMV failed units and monit phantom UUID spam
warnings.evidence: networking.service plus six quotaon@ units failed. Monit logs every 30 seconds for nonexistent UUID c950af78-1a6a-4b06-9d03-484c8126e9a1.
warnings.impact: NAS data mounts are available, but boot/service noise can mask real failures.

warnings.title: OMV disk transport/error counters elevated
warnings.evidence: UDMA_CRC: sdb=14647, sde=11156, sdd=14, sdg=7; command-timeout raw counters very high on sdd/sdg.
warnings.impact: May indicate cabling/backplane/controller issues in addition to sdg media degradation.

action_queue.action: Isolate and replace/restore from backup after SMART and cabling diagnosis
action_queue.why: Pending and offline-uncorrectable sectors are non-zero.

action_queue.action: Investigate repeated vzdump tar|zstd interruption and restore successful backup coverage
action_queue.why: Three consecutive failure pattern / last good archive Jul 7.

action_queue.action: Verify VM 100 running state and guest/network path from Proxmox console
action_queue.why: ICMP and SSH both timeout; services are unauditable.

action_queue.action: Add current LXCs to backup coverage or explicitly document disposable status
Diagnose failed units and phantom monit/quota configuration
action_queue.why: Persistent failed units and journal noise reduce reliability.

changes_since_previous: Baseline created; no prior local deep-audit report found.
